$schema._description: Upcoming version livestream per game. Update once a livestream is announced (typically ~10 days before next patch).

_fields.title: Optional version theme/name (e.g. 'Luna VII')
_fields.date: ISO datetime YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ. Use 12:00:00Z (UTC noon) if unknown — most livestreams air at 12:30 UTC.
_fields.highlights: Array of 1-4 short strings teasing what's expected (new characters, regions, etc.). Optional. After a stream airs, replace teasers with confirmed reveals.
_fields.codes: Array of livestream redemption code strings. Optional; populate after the stream airs. Shown only in the aired state.
_fields.codes_note: Short string describing the codes' reward/expiry (e.g. '100 Primogems each · expires Jun 21'). Optional.

_scrape_hints: Game8 wiki homepages list the next version livestream link once announced.
Livestream pages have a table with 'Release Date' and per-server times.
If the next version has no announced livestream yet, estimate ~10-12 days before expected version release.
GI: livestreams air Fridays at 08:00 AM EDT (12:00 UTC). GI 6.7 expected July 1 → livestream ~June 19.
HSR: livestreams air at 19:30 UTC+8 (11:30 UTC). HSR 4.4 expected July 15 → livestream ~July 3.
ZZZ: livestreams air at 19:30 UTC+8 (11:30 UTC). ZZZ 3.1 expected ~July 4 (2nd anniversary) → livestream ~June 21.

gi.title: Luna VIII
highlights: Sandrone — new 5★ Fatui Harbinger (Claymore), debuts Phase 1
The Moon — permanent new map beyond Teyvat
Fate/stay night collab: Rin Tohsaka & Gilgamesh
